samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_16bit">
    <description>Design a module of a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit input operand B.</input>
        <input id="Cin">Carry-in input.</input>
        <output id="y" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="Co">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        The module adder_16bit should represent a 16-bit full adder. 
        It has one combinational input port named a, b, and Cin. 
        It has two output ports named y and Co.
        You must describe the behavior of the 16-bit full adder in a <implementation> block.
        The implementation of adder_16bit can use the implementation of adder.
        Each input or output ports do not need to be used. You can define other implementation-specific ports.
        Do not describe the behavior of 16-bit full adder here.
    </implementation>
</module>

      |                                               ^
